labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://meduza.io/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmeduza.io%2F) ### Comment > ### 1. > Остатки пространства от заблокированного элемента > > ### 2. > Какой-то из фильтров Adguard блокирует push-уведомления от сайта ``` Username: @aturtsev ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/jr7z0g7mt344kc4wskcoggcksow8ko8hfkujcy46ps.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/p227ivit428cogsocs4c8k0gs8wg008gyzmnwxwq1k.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 3 ![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/bvde7kuqyc8csoso88wkc8kw0wswk4s8uigc8doftc.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.19.0.2258 release System version: | `MacOS 26.5.1 (Выпуск 25F80)` Browser: | yandex Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
EasyList Cookie List

**Security:**

Phishing URL Blocklist,
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Browser API**:
Block Java

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | enabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled Referrer: | [https://meduza.io/?__cf_chl_tk=QWHttGkLwkyIYmewmmgJcMZvkxMpIA1xkV8Lj76YRwE-1783885714-1.0.1.1-7nmKMa_bn7xtIwHyjRlfYjbG43FM2JjwkCnFcs3oqIk](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmeduza.io%2F%3F__cf_chl_tk%3DQWHttGkLwkyIYmewmmgJcMZvkxMpIA1xkV8Lj76YRwE-1783885714-1.0.1.1-7nmKMa_bn7xtIwHyjRlfYjbG43FM2JjwkCnFcs3oqIk) ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.19.0.2258+release&system_version=MacOS+26.5.1+%28%D0%92%D1%8B%D0%BF%D1%83%D1%81%D0%BA+25F80%29&browser=yandex&filters=1.2.3.17.18.19.21.118.208.241.255.256.257&dns.servers=System&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29&dns.filters=&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=true&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.java=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&referrer=https%253A%252F%252Fmeduza.io%252F%253F__cf_chl_tk%253DQWHttGkLwkyIYmewmmgJcMZvkxMpIA1xkV8Lj76YRwE-1783885714-1.0.1.1-7nmKMa_bn7xtIwHyjRlfYjbG43FM2JjwkCnFcs3oqIk&scheme_version=3&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=2000)

comment.body: И с уведомлениями проблем нет? Лично у меня при включённом Adguard не приходит запрос на отправку уведомлений от сайта. Как только выключаю, тут же всё в порядке. Только что проверил в Chrome. Как я могу помочь исправить это?

issue.title: meduza.io

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://meduza.io/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmeduza.io%2F) ### Comment > ### 1. > Остатки пространства от заблокированного элемента > > ### 2. > Какой-то из фильтров Adguard блокирует push-уведомления от сайта ``` Username: @aturtsev ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body: Или сам **фильтр всплывающих окон** предполагает отключение push-уведомлений от сайта? Покопавшись, нашёл там подобные правила по типу `Disabling of push-notifications`.
